schemes.name: PM Scholarship Scheme
schemes.description: Financial assistance for students pursuing higher education in engineering, medical, and other professional courses. Provides up to ₹36,000 per year for tuition fees and ₹20,000 for maintenance allowance.
schemes.keywords: student scholarship education higher engineering medical professional tuition fees

schemes.name: Ayushman Bharat - Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana
schemes.description: World's largest health insurance scheme providing coverage of up to ₹5 lakh per family per year for secondary and tertiary care hospitalization. Covers over 1,400 procedures including surgery, medical and daycare treatments.
schemes.keywords: health insurance medical treatment hospitalization surgery healthcare BPL families

schemes.name: PM Kisan Samman Nidhi Yojana
schemes.description: Direct income support scheme for farmers providing ₹6,000 per year in three equal installments of ₹2,000 each. Aims to supplement financial needs of land holding farmers for procuring inputs and other needs.
schemes.keywords: farmer agriculture income support land holding financial assistance rural

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana - Gramin
schemes.description: Housing scheme for rural areas providing assistance for construction of pucca houses with basic amenities. Provides ₹1.20 lakh in plain areas and ₹1.30 lakh in hilly/difficult areas.
schemes.keywords: housing rural pucca house construction BPL families shelter basic amenities

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri MUDRA Yojana
schemes.description: Micro-finance scheme providing loans up to ₹10 lakh for non-corporate, non-farm small/micro enterprises. Three categories: Shishu (up to ₹50,000), Kishore (₹50,000 to ₹5 lakh), Tarun (₹5 lakh to ₹10 lakh).
schemes.keywords: micro finance loan entrepreneur business small enterprise startup funding

schemes.name: Karnataka Vidyasiri Scheme
schemes.description: State scholarship scheme for economically weaker students pursuing professional courses like Engineering, Medical, Dental, Veterinary, and other technical courses in Karnataka. Provides fee reimbursement and maintenance allowance.
schemes.keywords: Karnataka student scholarship professional engineering medical technical fee reimbursement

schemes.name: Karnataka Anna Bhagya Scheme
schemes.description: Food security scheme providing 5 kg of rice per person per month to BPL families in Karnataka. Additional 2 kg of wheat and other essential commodities are also provided at subsidized rates.
schemes.keywords: Karnataka food security rice wheat BPL families ration subsidized commodities

schemes.name: Swachh Bharat Mission - Gramin
schemes.description: Sanitation program aimed at achieving Open Defecation Free (ODF) villages. Provides incentives for construction of individual household latrines and community sanitary complexes.
schemes.keywords: sanitation toilet construction ODF open defecation free rural hygiene cleanliness

schemes.name: Beti Bachao Beti Padhao
schemes.description: National initiative to address declining Child Sex Ratio and related issues of empowerment of women over a life-cycle continuum. Focuses on prevention of gender biased sex selective elimination and ensuring survival and protection of the girl child.
schemes.keywords: girl child women empowerment gender equality education protection survival

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana
schemes.description: Crop insurance scheme providing financial support to farmers suffering crop loss/damage arising out of unforeseen events. Covers all food crops, oilseeds, and annual commercial/horticultural crops.
schemes.keywords: crop insurance farmer agriculture financial support loss damage food crops oilseeds

schemes.name: Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act
schemes.description: Employment guarantee scheme providing at least 100 days of guaranteed wage employment in a financial year to every household whose adult members volunteer to do unskilled manual work.
schemes.keywords: rural employment guarantee wage work unskilled manual labor job card MGNREGA

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Jan Dhan Yojana
schemes.description: Financial inclusion program ensuring access to financial services like banking, savings & deposit accounts, remittance, credit, insurance, pension in an affordable manner.
schemes.keywords: financial inclusion banking savings deposit account insurance pension affordable

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana
schemes.description: LPG connection scheme providing free LPG connections to women from Below Poverty Line (BPL) households. Aims to empower women and protect their health by providing them with a clean cooking fuel.
schemes.keywords: LPG connection women BPL clean cooking fuel health empowerment gas cylinder

schemes.name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
schemes.description: Small deposit scheme for the girl child offering high rate of interest and tax benefits. Account can be opened for a girl child until she attains the age of 10 years with a minimum deposit of ₹250.
schemes.keywords: girl child savings deposit scheme high interest tax benefits education marriage

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana
schemes.description: Skill development scheme enabling Indian youth to take up industry-relevant skill training that will help them in securing a better livelihood. Monetary rewards are provided upon successful completion of training.
schemes.keywords: skill development training youth industry relevant livelihood monetary rewards employment

schemes.name: Atal Pension Yojana
schemes.description: Pension scheme for all citizens of India, particularly the poor, the underprivileged and the workers in the unorganised sector. Provides guaranteed minimum pension of ₹1,000 to ₹5,000 per month.
schemes.keywords: pension scheme guaranteed minimum pension poor underprivileged unorganised sector workers

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojana
schemes.description: Accident insurance scheme offering coverage for accidental death and permanent total disability. Premium of ₹12 per annum provides coverage of ₹2 lakh for accidental death and permanent total disability.
schemes.keywords: accident insurance accidental death permanent disability coverage premium affordable

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana
schemes.description: Life insurance scheme providing life cover of ₹2 lakh for one year in case of death due to any reason. Premium of ₹330 per annum is auto-debited from the account holder's bank account.
schemes.keywords: life insurance life cover death premium auto-debit bank account affordable

schemes.name: Stand Up India Scheme
schemes.description: Facilitates bank loans between ₹10 lakh and ₹1 crore to at least one Scheduled Caste or Scheduled Tribe borrower and at least one woman borrower per bank branch for setting up a greenfield enterprise.
schemes.keywords: bank loans SC ST women entrepreneur greenfield enterprise business startup funding

schemes.name: Karnataka KSRTC Student Bus Pass Scheme
schemes.description: Concessional bus pass scheme for students in Karnataka providing 50% discount on KSRTC bus fares for students studying in recognized educational institutions.
schemes.keywords: Karnataka student bus pass KSRTC discount transportation educational institutions

schemes.name: Karnataka Bhagyalakshmi Scheme
schemes.description: Scheme for the girl child providing financial assistance at different stages of education. Provides ₹2,000 at birth, ₹1,000 each at completion of 1st, 3rd, 5th, 8th, and 10th standards.
schemes.keywords: Karnataka girl child financial assistance education birth completion standards

schemes.name: Karnataka Gruha Jyoti Scheme
schemes.description: Free electricity scheme providing 200 units of free electricity per month to households in Karnataka. Aimed at providing relief to domestic consumers and promoting energy conservation.
schemes.keywords: Karnataka free electricity 200 units domestic consumers energy conservation relief

schemes.name: Karnataka Shakti Scheme
schemes.description: Free bus travel scheme for women in Karnataka providing free travel in KSRTC buses within the state. Aims to empower women by providing them with free and safe transportation.
schemes.keywords: Karnataka women free bus travel KSRTC empowerment safe transportation

schemes.name: Karnataka Yuva Nidhi Scheme
schemes.description: Unemployment allowance scheme providing ₹3,000 per month for graduates and ₹1,500 per month for diploma holders for up to two years while they search for employment.
schemes.keywords: Karnataka unemployment allowance graduates diploma holders employment search monthly payment

schemes.name: Karnataka Krishi Bhagya Scheme
schemes.description: Agricultural scheme providing free electricity for irrigation pump sets to farmers in Karnataka. Aims to support agricultural activities and improve crop productivity.
schemes.keywords: Karnataka agriculture free electricity irrigation pump sets farmers crop productivity

schemes.name: Digital India Programme
schemes.description: Flagship programme to transform India into a digitally empowered society and knowledge economy. Focuses on digital infrastructure, governance & services on demand, and digital empowerment of citizens.
schemes.keywords: digital transformation digitally empowered society knowledge economy infrastructure governance services

schemes.name: Startup India Initiative
schemes.description: Flagship initiative to build a strong eco-system for nurturing innovation and startups in the country. Provides tax benefits, easier compliance, IPR fast-tracking, and funding support.
schemes.keywords: startup innovation ecosystem tax benefits compliance IPR funding support entrepreneur

schemes.name: Make in India Initiative
schemes.description: Major national programme to facilitate investment, foster innovation, enhance skill development, protect intellectual property and build best in class manufacturing infrastructure.
schemes.keywords: manufacturing investment innovation skill development intellectual property infrastructure

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Gram Sadak Yojana
schemes.description: Rural road connectivity programme providing all-weather road connectivity to unconnected habitations in rural areas. Focuses on connecting villages with population of 500+ (250+ in hilly/tribal areas).
schemes.keywords: rural road connectivity all-weather roads unconnected habitations villages population

schemes.name: National Health Mission
schemes.description: Health system strengthening programme providing accessible, affordable, accountable, effective and reliable primary healthcare services. Focuses on maternal and child health, communicable and non-communicable diseases.
schemes.keywords: health system strengthening primary healthcare maternal child health communicable diseases

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Matru Vandana Yojana
schemes.description: Maternity benefit programme providing cash incentive of ₹5,000 to pregnant women and lactating mothers for the first living child to meet the increased nutritional needs and wage loss.
schemes.keywords: maternity benefit pregnant women lactating mothers cash incentive nutritional needs wage loss

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Shram Yogi Maan-dhan
schemes.description: Voluntary and contributory pension scheme for unorganised workers with monthly income up to ₹15,000. Provides assured pension of ₹3,000 per month after attaining the age of 60 years.
schemes.keywords: pension scheme unorganised workers contributory assured pension monthly income

schemes.name: One Nation One Ration Card
schemes.description: Food security scheme enabling migrant workers and their family members to access PDS benefits from any Fair Price Shop in the country using the same ration card.
schemes.keywords: food security migrant workers PDS benefits fair price shop ration card portability
